keyInfo.info: Stack: local Postgres, Railway deploy, CI/E2E. docker-compose.yml for local. railway.json for production. ecosystem.config.js for PM2.
Railway healthcheck timeout must be 600s. Default timeout caused false-negative deploy failures. railway.json controls this.
SQL interpolation eliminated in reivindicacoes (explicit query branches). CORS rejects cross-origin in production when CORS_ORIGIN env is not set.
Enforce first-login password change: auth middleware blocks requests until password is changed. Schema, routes, frontend modal, and seed scripts all updated.
